creator: patrick@mindstep.com
text:
Hi,

Although I appreciate the fact that you give credit in your version of the
script I submitted for the DHCP client stuff, I would not go as far as
calling it a full rewrite.

Anyway, I have fixed the licence on the original version of that script, and
it is now a 2 clause BSD (which was my intent to begin with). My silence on
this issue was due to a wrong email address...

Please update the script as you think is necessary, but don't call it a full
rewrite if it is not one :).

Also I think that not catching unexpected values for $reason is potentially
dangerous in your script, as well as not keeping the "local" qualifiers for
variables that are used only in the script functions.


Sincerely,


Patrick.
